creator: jjneely@linuxczar.net
text:
Alas, turning off vchans does not make a difference.  Still no sound at all.

	[dsp4.play.0]: spd 48000, fmt 0x00201000, flags 0x0000110c, 0x00000021, pid 63793 (firefox)
		interrupts 7899, underruns 6378, feed 7898, ready 0

		channel flags=0x110c<RUNNING,TRIGGERED,BUSY,HAS_SIZE>
